intent.summary: Research-backed enhancement of ASS-ADE via three depth plans: expansion (technical terrain), evolution (governance), promotion (credibility and distribution), aligned with MCP spec trust model and repo gates.
deliverables: ato-plan folder with plan.md, research.md, tasks.json, evolution.log
Context pack (this directory) for downstream /ato-pilot or /ass implementation
Executable first nodes: T1 recon; parallel lanes E/V/P per tasks.json in ato-plan

queries: Model Context Protocol specification latest tools security
hops.findingSummary: MCP uses JSON-RPC 2.0; servers expose tools/resources/prompts; specification emphasizes user consent, data privacy, and treating tools as privileged execution with cautious descriptions.

verificationEvidence.note: External spec; implement consent and tool-safety in ass_ade MCP handlers and docs.

hops.findingSummary: Large-scale empirical study of public MCP repositories (177k+ tools): categorizes perception vs reasoning vs action tools; reports rising share of action tools and discusses oversight at the tool layer.

verificationEvidence.note: Use as external motivation for registry discipline and risk framing; do not reproduce paper statistics without DEFER or reproduced methodology (see .ass-ade/research-radar/DEFER-paper-statistics.md).

risksAndGaps: Canonical git remote for workspace root not confirmed in this session; promotion URLs may be pending.
Hosted MCP parity remains roadmap-aspirational until smoke artifacts land.
External benchmark papers (e.g. MCP-Bench class) cited only at ecosystem level unless DEFER lifted.
